human_actions_pending.action: Optional: reverse-order completion test to independently rule out min
human_actions_pending.context: Currently inferred from family consistency. Complete Root first (earlier timestamp), then Mid (later). If first-found, Inner-Blocker shows Mid's (nearer). If min, shows Root's (earlier).

human_actions_pending.action: Optional: drop or complete a project to verify project-to-task lifecycle inheritance
human_actions_pending.context: All lifecycle tests were task-to-task. _walk_one includes project as final ancestor, so same rule should apply, but untested.

decisions.rationale: REPLICATED — L3 decisive (own=2025, eff=2027 from L2)
REPLICATED — unflagged project, L3 flagged, L1/L2 false proves downward-only
REPLICATED — reverse-order drop (Mid first, Root second) + nearer-ancestor drop (Inner). Min ruled out session 2, max ruled out session 3.
HIGH confidence — max ruled out empirically, identical behavior to drop in all tests. Min inferred from family consistency.

decisions.decision: Auto-complete triggers when ALL children have own lifecycle status
decisions.rationale: HIGH confidence — effectively dropped doesn't count; always produces completed; erases dropDate

decisions.decision: Planned date = scoped intent, not completion target
decisions.rationale: Design discussion: min would collapse phased schedules. Updated descriptions.py and omnifocus-concepts.md

decisions.decision: Effective values are derived, not stored
decisions.rationale: Proven: nearer-ancestor drop changed effective despite already effectively dropped. Un-drop/re-drop cycle showed no memory of previous state.

decisions.decision: Our inherited* replaces OmniFocus effective* — ancestor-only, no self-echo
decisions.rationale: Architecture doc clarified: OmniFocus has own+effective (merged). We have own+inherited (ancestor contribution only, absent when no ancestor contributes).

next_action: Decide on two optional gaps (min-for-completion, project-to-task lifecycle), then proceed to fix _walk_one implementation. Two gaps are optional — can skip if user considers family consistency sufficient.
context_notes: Session 3 completed the full empirical study. All 6 inherited fields confirmed. Key insight documented: effective values are derived (live tree walk), not stored/latched. Architecture.md updated to clearly separate our inherited* concept from OmniFocus effective*. FIXME comments in domain.py and descriptions.py link to FINDINGS.md. Project is currently UNFLAGGED — re-flag before non-inheritance work. Test hierarchies still in OmniFocus (UAT-Due-L*, UAT-Drop-*, UAT-Test-*, UAT-Comp-*).
